title: Create family blog with posts, comments, and author profiles

requirements.text: Create a backend data model for blog posts with fields: id, title, content, author name, creation timestamp, and optional featured image URL
acceptanceCriteria: Blog posts can be created with all required fields
Each post has a unique identifier
Posts are stored persistently in stable memory

requirements.text: Implement backend methods to create, read, update, and delete blog posts
acceptanceCriteria: Users can create new blog posts
Users can retrieve all posts or a single post by ID
Users can update existing posts
Users can delete posts

requirements.text: Create a backend data model for comments with fields: id, post id reference, author name, comment text, and timestamp
acceptanceCriteria: Comments are linked to specific blog posts
Comments persist across canister upgrades
Each comment has a unique identifier

requirements.text: Implement backend methods to add comments to posts and retrieve all comments for a specific post
acceptanceCriteria: Users can add comments to any blog post
Comments can be retrieved filtered by post ID
Comments are returned in chronological order

requirements.text: Build a homepage that displays all blog posts in reverse chronological order with title, author, excerpt, and timestamp
acceptanceCriteria: All published posts are visible on the homepage
Posts show newest first
Each post card shows title, author name, date, and content preview
Clicking a post navigates to its detail page

requirements.text: Create a blog post detail page that displays the full post content, author information, and all associated comments
acceptanceCriteria: Full post content is rendered with proper formatting
Author name and publication date are displayed
All comments for the post are shown below the content
Page is accessible via unique URL for each post

requirements.text: Implement a comment form on the post detail page allowing users to add new comments with their name and comment text
acceptanceCriteria: Form includes fields for commenter name and comment text
Form validates that both fields are filled before submission
After successful submission, the new comment appears in the comment list
Form clears after successful submission

requirements.text: Create a blog post creation form with fields for title, author name, content, and optional featured image URL
acceptanceCriteria: Form includes all required fields with appropriate input types
Form validates required fields before submission
After successful submission, user is redirected to the new post
Error messages display if submission fails

requirements.text: Implement post editing functionality allowing users to update existing blog posts
acceptanceCriteria: Edit form pre-populates with existing post data
Users can modify any field
Changes are saved to the backend
Updated post displays the modified content

requirements.text: Add a delete button to posts that allows removal with confirmation
acceptanceCriteria: Delete button is visible on post detail or edit pages
Confirmation dialog appears before deletion
After confirmation, post is removed from backend
User is redirected to homepage after deletion

requirements.text: Design and implement a cohesive visual theme inspired by warm, family-oriented aesthetics with earth tones, comfortable typography, and inviting layouts that create a welcoming atmosphere for sharing family stories and memories
acceptanceCriteria: Color palette uses warm, family-friendly tones avoiding blue and purple
Typography is readable and approachable
Layout creates a comfortable reading experience
Design maintains consistency across all pages

requirements.text: Render generated header banner and family photo placeholder images as static assets from frontend/public/assets/generated
acceptanceCriteria: Header banner image displays at the top of the homepage
Placeholder family photo renders correctly
Images are served from the static assets directory
Images have appropriate alt text for accessibility

constraints: All backend logic must be implemented in a single Motoko actor in backend/main.mo
Do not modify files in frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
nonGoals: Rich text editor for post content

required: Warm, family-oriented header banner with abstract shapes and earth tones (header-banner.dim_1200x300.png)
Placeholder illustration representing a family gathering or photo album in warm colors (family-placeholder.dim_400x400.png)
